titleStmt.title: SII 25.77: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 77. (A.R. No. 77 of 1908.) VEḌĀL, WANDIWASH TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Nīlakaṇṭhēśvara temple.

This inscription may be assigned on palaeographical grounds to c. 13th Century. The details of the date viz., Mēsha śu 3, Monday and Mūlam are irregular as the nakshatra Mūlam do not fall in the month of Mēsha and on the śukla tritīya day. The nakshatra has been wrongly read as Hasta which cannot fall in the month of Mēsha and on Śukla tritīya day. The details of date given above may correspond with four dates viz., A.D., 1204, 1231, 1258 and 1302 in this period. But his 25th year of rule do not regularly agree with any of the first three dates. It corresponds to 1302 A.D.

It records a gift of lands in the village Aruḷi-ēttal in Attip-paṟṟu to conduct a festival called Śeyyāṟṟu-veṉṟāṉ-tirunāḷ and to provide for the repairs and perpetual lamp to god Kaṟaikkaṇḍīśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār at Viḍār in Viḍārpaṟṟu alias Vikramapāṇḍya-vaḷanāḍu in Veṇkuṉṟak-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kulacekarac campuvarāyaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 5 Āvatu meṣa nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu tṛtiyaiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa mulattu nāḷ
cayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa maṇṭalattu veṇkuṉṟak koṭṭattu viṭārpaṟṟāṉa vikramapāṇṭiya vaḷanāṭṭu viṭāril Uṭaiyār kaṟaik kaṇṭīśvaramuṭaiya nāya
ṉāṟku ceyyāṟṟuveṉṟāṉ tirunāḷukkum tiruppaṇikkum tirunantāviḷakkukkum Attippaṟṟu Aruḷi Ettal cantrātittar varaiyum naṭakkumpaṭikku
sarvvamānnya Iṟaiyili tirunāmattukkāṇi Āka Iṉṉāyanāṟku Ivvūr nāṟpāṟkellaiyum tiruccūla stāpaṉam paṇṇi kallilum cem
pilum veṭṭik kuṭuttōm .
Digital edition of SII 25.77 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
